summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CodEge Turkish landing page. All major features working correctly with minor navigation scrolling issues.

navigation_issues.issue: Navigation links for 'Nasıl Çalışır' and 'Fiyatlar' sections don't scroll to exact viewport position
navigation_issues.impact: Minor UX issue - sections are accessible but scroll position not optimal

passed_tests: Hero section with title, subtitle and 2 CTA buttons
Dark mode toggle functionality working correctly
Mobile menu toggle and navigation working
All CTA buttons correctly link to https://t.me/egecz
Projects section with 3 project cards displayed
Pricing section with 3 tiers (Starter, Growth, Full Automation)
How It Works section with 4 steps
Footer with CodEge logo and Telegram link
Floating Telegram button visible and functional
Theme toggle working on both desktop and mobile
All Telegram links pointing to correct URL (https://t.me/egecz)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Improve navigation scrolling precision for 'Nasıl Çalışır' and 'Fiyatlar' sections to ensure they scroll to optimal viewport position
